name: @metorial/verifiedemail
description: Verify email addresses in real time and clean bulk email lists. Perform single email verification with domain health checks, mail server validation, misspelled domain detection, role/alias identification, and deliverability scoring. Upload and process bulk email lists to eliminate undeliverable addresses with 99% precision. Set up continuous list maintenance to automatically re-verify and sync email lists with CRMs and email providers. Manage webhooks to receive notifications on verification job completion. Check credit balance and configure auto-refill settings. Manage API keys with granular permissions for different verification functions.
